hero.headlinePart2: so they run without you in the room
hero.subhead: We map your processes and build around your logic — not boxed software. AI agents, chatbots, integrations, CRM, custom.
hero.trustLine: Document workflow · city administration · −90% time · in production

pain.title: Sound familiar?

items.title: Days lost to copy-paste
items.body: Your team moves data between systems by hand, fills out reports, types the same thing into three places. Hours that should have been decisions.

items.title: Lead arrives at 10pm — gone by 10:05
items.body: Without instant response, conversion collapses. You pay for traffic, reply next day — and lose the money twice.

items.title: Four systems, four versions of the truth
items.body: CRM, inventory, accounting, marketing — each with its own numbers. Every report is assembled by hand, errors compound, the team argues instead of working.

items.title: Revenue grows — payroll grows in lockstep
items.body: Without automation, every new dollar of revenue costs almost as much as the last. Hiring, training, churn. The business scales on your nerves.

pain.answer: We come in, map the processes and tell you straight: automate fully, automate partially, or don't bother. No fluff, no upsell.

approach.title: We don't sell boxes
approach.lead: Every business is unique. So is the solution that fits it. We don't repackage SaaS, we don't bend your processes around someone else's template. We build around your operating logic — otherwise the automation simply won't take root.

principles.title: One client — one project
principles.body: No two businesses are alike — neither are our builds. Every solution is designed from scratch around your processes, people and tools.

principles.title: Stack picked for the task, not for us
principles.body: n8n, Make, Python, low-code, custom — we choose what fits your case best. We don't push a technology because it's convenient for us.

principles.title: Won't pay back — we'll say so ourselves
principles.body: We don't talk you into automating for the invoice. Sometimes the right answer is "leave it to the humans." We'll say it honestly and explain why.

services.title: We automate knowledge work
services.lead: Fully or partially — any repeatable process where a human does what machines have done for years. The hard part isn't "how" — it's "what's actually worth automating". That's where we come in.
services.selectorHint: We'll show what's worth automating first
services.individualNote: The exact set and stack are tailored to your processes — these are just typical scenarios

niches.label: Restaurant · HoReCa
niches.summary: Orders, bookings, supplies and analytics — no managers on the phone.
items: Order intake via WhatsApp/Telegram, auto-saved to POS
Table reservations with confirmations and reminders
Auto-reports on revenue, average check and bestselling items
Stock control, auto-purchase orders to suppliers, demand forecast

niches.label: E-commerce · shop
niches.summary: Listings, support and inventory running themselves 24/7.
items: AI consultant on site: helps pick the product and closes the sale
Auto-generated product cards, descriptions and SEO across the catalog
Sync inventory ↔ marketplaces ↔ CRM in real time
Behavior-triggered emails and abandoned cart recovery

niches.label: Agency · services
niches.summary: Lead gen, qualification and client onboarding on autopilot.
items: AI qualifies inbound: the bot asks about budget and scope on its own
Auto-generated proposals and contracts from CRM templates
Client reports: metrics, screenshots, status — weekly, hands-off
Employee onboarding: checklists, access, training in a Telegram bot

niches.label: Manufacturing
niches.summary: Documents, requests, QC and plan-vs-actual without paper.
items: Material and purchase requests: routing, approvals, deadlines
Digital document workflow: incoming, outgoing, executor tracking
Shop floor dashboards: plan-vs-actual, downtime, root causes — live
Photo-based QC with AI: defects caught on the line

niches.label: Real estate
niches.summary: Leads, viewings and deals — faster than the competing agent.
items: AI bot on listings: qualifies leads and books a viewing in 30 sec
Auto-matching properties to client requests across all sources
Pipeline reminders and follow-ups: nothing falls through the cracks
One-click property decks and deal document packs

niches.label: B2B · services · SaaS
niches.summary: Funnel, billing, support and onboarding on a conveyor.
items: AI sales agent: qualifies, books demos, drafts proposals
Billing + CRM + support stitched into a single client record
Auto-onboarding for new clients: emails, access, training flows
Support conversation analysis: what breaks, what's missing in the product

services.ctaHint: Don't see your niche? Describe the task — we'll figure it out.

case.title: Digital document workflow for a city administration
case.lede: We delivered a full incoming/outgoing document handling system: routing, approvals, deadline control, executor notifications. In production from month one.

alsoBuilt.title: Marketing websites
alsoBuilt.body: Landing pages and corporate sites with form-to-CRM and messenger integrations baked in.

alsoBuilt.title: Telegram bots
alsoBuilt.body: Bots that talk to customers, collect data, write into CRM and sheets — for services, bookings and support.

alsoBuilt.title: Turnkey integrations
alsoBuilt.body: n8n / Make scenarios linking CRM, inventory, payments and notifications — zero manual steps.

steps.title: Discovery & audit
steps.body: We get on a call and dig into your processes — no templates, no canned answers. You get a process map and the spots where automation actually pays off in your specific case.

steps.title: Prototype on your logic
steps.body: We build a minimal working version on your real data and scenarios. You see the impact on concrete cases before signing the bigger scope.

steps.title: Rollout
steps.body: We scale the prototype, integrate with existing systems, train the team, and document everything.

steps.title: Support
steps.body: We monitor stability, adjust to process changes, and add new scenarios on demand.

team.title: Two of us — both build
team.body: We moved to Dubai to deliver real value to local businesses: we ship what pays back and talk you out of what doesn't. No middlemen — the person on the call is the one who writes the code. Every project is run personally, from first call to release.

items.q: Do you have a ready-made solution for my task?
items.a: No — by design. We don't sell boxes. Every build is assembled around a specific business: your processes, your stack, your people. That's why it actually takes root, instead of "only working in ideal conditions".
Depends on scope and complexity — every solution is custom. After the audit we name a range in EUR / AED for a specific scope. You pay either fixed or per milestone.
By default client data never leaves their infrastructure. AI models and integrations are deployed inside your perimeter when policy requires it.
A simple bot — 1–2 weeks. Integrations — 2–4 weeks. Document-workflow-grade automation — 2–3 months to full rollout.
Support is included. Same business-day response, critical incidents prioritized. Every scenario is monitored.

items.q: Which industries do you work with?
items.a: Public sector, services, e-commerce, agencies, SaaS, manufacturing, real estate. We take a project on if we see automation will actually pay back — otherwise we'll say no ourselves.

items.q: Do I need a long-term contract?
items.a: No. We can work on a single project or a monthly support retainer. No minimum commitment.

contact.title: Tell us about the task
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form or message us directly — we'll get back at a time that works for you. We'll look at what you have and propose a fit.
contact.success: Got it. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Message us on Telegram instead.

meta.title: MagicWork — bespoke business process automation
meta.description: AI agents, chatbots, integrations, CRM, custom development. Dubai. Built around your operating logic — no boxes, no templates. Case: −90% time on document workflow.
